mnemonics: QUICK Retrieval: Query Understanding, Indexing, Clustering, Keyword weighting
keyPoints: Vocabulary mismatch between user queries and document terms.
Efficient and scalable indexing of massive document collections.
Evaluating retrieval performance using precision and recall metrics.
commonMistakes: Confusing precision (relevance of retrieved results) with recall (completeness of retrieval).
Overlooking the importance of stop-word removal and stemming during indexing.
